title: McGraw-Hill's Core Data Structure Concepts
description: A flowchart illustrating the foundational data structure categories and their relationships as presented in McGraw-Hill educational materials.
relationships: Linear Data Structures branch into Homogeneous (Arrays) and Dynamic (Linked Lists)
Non-Linear Data Structures branch into Hierarchical (Trees) and Network (Graphs)
Arrays are Static and allow Direct Access
Linked Lists are Dynamic and require Sequential Access
Trees and Graphs are both Dynamic Non-Linear structures
